name: Grilled Summer Vegetables.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the aubergine into quarter-inch slices.
2. Cut the courgettes diagonally into 1 cm (half-inch) slices.
3. Cut the peppers into large slices.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the olive oil, wine vinegar, crushed garlic, chopped oregano, and ground black pepper.
5. Add the vegetables to the mixture and toss to coat evenly.
6. Cover and let marinate for at least one hour.
7. Cook the vegetables on a barbecue or under a hot grill until just tender, basting frequently.
